div.h1: Crash During Undo Test: CLR-Based Recovery Resumption

p.strong: Implementation Spec: ARIES WAL Idempotency Strategy

ul.li: undo_next_lsn: Pointer to the next record of the transaction that still needs to be undone.
Idempotency: If system crashes during recovery, the presence of LSN 300 tells the next recovery to skip LSN 250.

g.text: Data Integrity: Page 1 restored to [A, C, E]
